name: Remove.bg API
what_it_does: AI-powered background removal API focused on a single, highly-optimized task: removing image backgrounds with high accuracy across diverse subject types.
use_cases: Profile picture background removal at scale
not_for: High-volume use without budget for per-image pricing
best_when: Automated background removal at scale with predictable, high-accuracy results on a simple single-purpose API.
avoid_when: Complex scenes requiring manual precision, video content, or budget-constrained high-volume processing.

auth.notes: Simple API key in X-Api-Key header. Free tier available with 50 API calls. No scope complexity.

pricing.notes: Credit-based pricing. Volume discounts available via subscription tiers. Transparent pricing page.

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Clear error codes for credit exhaustion (402), invalid API key (403), and file size limits (400). HTTP status codes are correct and predictable.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: Image processing is deterministic for same input; safe to retry on transient failures
known_agent_gotchas: Credit exhaustion returns 402 Payment Required, not 429 Too Many Requests
Large image files (>10MB) cause slow processing; consider resizing before upload
Result image format (PNG vs ZIP) must be specified in request — defaults may not suit pipeline
Free tier uses lower-resolution output; paid tier required for full HD

security_score_components.security_notes: Simple API key with no scope granularity — one key controls full account. TLS enforced. No webhook signatures needed. Documented GDPR compliance. Multiple official SDKs reduce integration risk.
